levels.body: To read (over), in the sense of "to read through again; to reread" (Def. 2.)
worksCited: "over-read, v." Def.2. *OED Online*. OUP, Sept. 2016. Web. 08 Dec. 2016.

levels.body: Given that "over-read" also implies a notion of repetition, the process of the verse being read frequently and by many people is stressed.
